title: quercus stenophylla var. stenophylloides
intro: Quercus stenophylla var. stenophylloides is a variant of the Quercus stenophylla, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak, a deciduous tree native to Japan and Korea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus stenophylla var. stenophylloides include its potential to treat fever, sore throats, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Quercus stenophylla var. stenophylloides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and bark are often used in herbal remedies.
